meta.note: The Act pantheon (spec-the-pantheon.md): one contrastive cartridge per face-value, summed at the cube cell the surfer reads. This file ships EMPTY token maps — loadPantheon returns a bank with no steering, so auto-mount still NAMES which gods mount (the Given-Log) and the λ term is a no-op until baked. Bake from a legal run's corrected classified.jsonl (DEF/EVA/REC, not the pre-relabel runs) via `node scripts/distill-voice.mjs`, toward−against per god. God identities, caps, and toward/against seeds are the canonical reference in src/write/voice.js PANTHEON.
